title: Nyêmo Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Nyêmo with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nyêmo are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The relative humidity is at 83%, and the wind speed is 4.0 km/h, contributing to the harsh conditions. 
 The HDD value of 12.0 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG further emphasize the severity of the cold snap.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap in Nyêmo.
